canonical_definition: The Schema-Guided Dialogue (SGD) dataset, a challenging benchmark for multi-domain task-oriented dialogue that includes unseen domains in its test set to evaluate generalization.
papers: CAST: Corpus-Aware Self-similarity Enhanced Topic modelling
SSH: Sparse Spectrum Adaptation via Discrete Hartley Transformation
